name: WebGL.Shape2d

unions.name: Shape2d
unions.comment:
Main building block

    rectangle : Vec3 -> Float -> Float -> Shape2d
    rectangle color width height =
        Shape2d
            { x = 0
            , y = 0
            , a = 0
            , sx = 1
            , sy = 1
            , o = 1
            , form = Form width height (Render.rect color)
            }
cases: { x : Basics.Float, y : Basics.Float, z : Basics.Float, a : Basics.Float, sx : Basics.Float, sy : Basics.Float, o : Basics.Float, form : WebGL.Shape2d.Form }

aliases.name: Render
aliases.comment:
Render is part of `Shape2d` that converts `Shape2d` into `Entity`

    rect : Vec3 -> Render
    rect color uP uT opacity =
        WebGL.entity
            Shader.vertNone
            Shader.fragFill
            Shader.mesh
            { color = color
            , opacity = opacity
            , uP = uP
            , uT = uT
            }

aliases.name: ScaleRotateSkew
aliases.comment:
Vec4 representing part of transform matrix

    | x y 0 |
    | z w 0 |
    | 0 0 1 |

aliases.name: Translate
aliases.comment:
Vec2 representing part of transform matrix

    | 1 0 x |
    | 0 1 y |
    | 0 0 1 |

aliases.name: Z
aliases.comment: Css line `z-index` that is passed to the Render

values.name: toEntities
values.comment:
Converts shapes to WebGL entities and `Set` of missing texture filenames

    import WebGL
    import WebGL.Shape2d

    main =
        WebGL.Shape2d.toEntities Dict.empty 100 100 [ rectangle red 30 30 ]
            |> Tuple.first
            |> Webgl.toHtml [ width 100, height 100 ]
values.type: Dict.Dict String.String WebGL.Texture.Texture -> { b | width : Basics.Float, height : Basics.Float } -> List.List WebGL.Shape2d.Shape2d -> ( List.List WebGL.Entity, Set.Set String.String )
